testcase.name: test_08_ai_credits_history

failure.message: AssertionError: History should be a list assert False + where False = isinstance({'history': [{'action': 'suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T07:03:16.469588+00:00', 'credits': -1, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'risk_analysis', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:45:39.795586+00:00', 'credits': -5, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'risk_analysis', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:45:34.308120+00:00', 'credits': -5, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'brand_way_suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:56.812366+00:00', 'credits': -2, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'mentor_insight', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:49.348933+00:00', 'credits': -3, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:43.325373+00:00', 'credits': -1, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_maturity_diagnosis.py:246: in test_08_ai_credits_history assert isinstance(data, list), "History should be a list" E AssertionError: History should be a list E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'history': [{'action': 'suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T07:03:16.469588+00:00', 'credits': -1, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'risk_analysis', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:45:39.795586+00:00', 'credits': -5, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'risk_analysis', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:45:34.308120+00:00', 'credits': -5, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'brand_way_suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:56.812366+00:00', 'credits': -2, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'mentor_insight', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:49.348933+00:00', 'credits': -3, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, {'action': 'suggestion', 'created_at': '2026-02-17T06:44:43.325373+00:00', 'credits': -1, 'user_id': 'user_9f0de0d45197'}, ...]}, list)
